subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is Thy servant who doth beseech Thee and supplicate at the gate of Thy oneness, standing firm and steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک المبتهل الیک المتضرع بباب احدیتک الثابت الراسخ علی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @The Holy Spirit, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
